brief_notes: Strong computational methods paper with clear presentation of the edge-centric GNN approach for MS/MS prediction. The softmax formulation for fragment probabilities is well-defined. Architecture comparison, stratification by Tanimoto similarity, and multi-property prediction (RT, CCS) demonstrate thoroughness. Tables again use ordinal rankings rather than exact cosine similarity values, which weakens the quantitative rigor. Discussion of the 3-6 layer optimum provides good theoretical insight. Citations are relevant and span the metabolomics and GNN literature.
